title: Kishen Kanhaiya
desc: Twin brothers Kishen and Kanhaiya, separated at birth-one rich, one poor-reunite years later to join forces and battle evil, proving blood ties conquer all odds.

title: King Uncle
desc: Industrialist Ashok Bansal's stern ways push his siblings away. When orphan girl Munna arrives, her warmth slowly melts his cold heart, bringing family back together.

title: Yamla Pagla Deewana 2
desc: Dharam and Gajodhar, a father-son duo, pose as owners of a huge company to con a business tycoon, but things spiral when Gajodhar's brother joins the scheme.

title: Jawaani Jaaneman
desc: Jazz, a carefree 40-year-old casanova in London, has his world turned upside down when Tia, claiming to be his daughter, enters his life and forces him to change.

title: Sooryavanshi
desc: With Mumbai under threat of a major terrorist attack, ATS chief Sooryavanshi launches a high-stakes mission to track down 600 kg of missing RDX and the masterminds behind the plot.

title: Jaat
desc: In a quiet coastal village ruled by fear, Varadaraja Ranatunga's tyranny goes unchecked-until a wandering stranger's clash with his men exposes the villagers' silent suffering.

title: Sam Bahadur
desc: Sam Manekshaw, one of India's most decorated army officers, served for over four decades, fought five wars, and became the first Indian officer to be promoted to Field Marshal.

title: Krantiveer
desc: Pratap, disowned by his parents, finds himself in a small village ruled by gangsters and corrupt politicians. He faces tough challenges as he tries to navigate this dangerous world.

title: Awarapan
desc: Shivam, a hitman, is ordered to watch a woman. He finds out she's trapped in a trafficking ring and decides to help her reunite with her true love.

title: Hero No. 1
desc: A rich businessman hides his identity and pretends to be Raju, happily doing household chores. His skills and charm help him win over his girlfriend's family, all for love.

title: Singh Is King
desc: Happy, known for his wild antics, is sent to bring Lakhan to his ailing father. In Australia, events take a turn as Happy accidentally assumes Lakhan's role as the local underworld king.

title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
desc: Ramkishan and Mamta live happily with their sons. But when tragedy strikes their daughter, Mamta's heart changes, and she turns against her kind stepson, Vivek.

title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan, a businessman with a simple wife, and Narayan, jobless with an ultra-modern wife, try to impress each other's spouses, leading to a chain of hilarious mishaps.

title: Filler
desc: A quick preview of movie and TV show highlights-emotional, romantic, and action-packed scenes that keep audiences hooked, offering glimpses of drama, love, and thrilling entertainment.

title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan, a businessman with a simple wife, and Narayan, jobless with an ultra-modern wife, try to impress each other's spouses, leading to a chain of hilarious mishaps.

title: Auron Mein Kahan Dum Tha
desc: Krishna and Vasudha's love story faces tragedy when Krishna is accused of murder. Released after 23 years in prison, he seeks closure and an emotional reunionwith Vasudha.

title: Khatarnak
desc: Suraj, a charming criminal, falls head over heels for Dr. Sangeeta. She's willing to marry him, but there's a catch: he must turn his life around first.
